block.desc: techs knowledge base generation input parameters

field.name: completed_dir
field.desc: Marker file output directory for Worker results (absolute path required)

field.name: ide_skills_dir
field.desc: Absolute path to IDE skills directory (e.g., .qoder/skills, .cursor/skills)

block.field: This skill is an ORCHESTRATION PLAYBOOK — it MUST be loaded directly by Team Leader via Skill tool
Worker Agents MUST NOT execute this dispatch skill — if loaded by a Worker, report error and abort
Downstream worker skills (techs-init, techs-generate-conventions, techs-generate-ui-style, etc.) MUST be dispatched via Task tool → speccrew-task-worker
DO NOT ask user "Should I continue?" or "How would you like to proceed?" between stages
DO NOT offer options like "Full execution / Sample execution / Pause" — always execute ALL stages to completion
DO NOT suggest "Let me split this into batches" or "Let's do this in parts" — process ALL platforms sequentially
DO NOT pause to list what you plan to do next — just do it
DO NOT ask for confirmation before generating output files
DO NOT warn about "large number of files" or "this may take a while" — proceed with generation
ONLY pause at explicit <event action="confirm"> blocks defined in the workflow
DO NOT offer "continue/pause/partial" options — EVER
DO NOT estimate workload and suggest breaking it into phases — execute ALL phases in sequence
When many platforms need analysis, dispatch ALL of them — do NOT skip or defer any
Context window management: if approaching limit, save progress to checkpoint file and resume — do NOT ask user for guidance
FORBIDDEN: Python, Ruby, Perl, compiled binaries, or any runtime requiring separate installation
PERMITTED scripting: PowerShell (Windows) and Bash (Linux/Mac) ONLY
PERMITTED Node.js: ONLY for existing project scripts (e.g., node scripts/update-progress.js)
For JSON validation use: node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('file.json','utf8'))"
For JSON creation use: node -e with inline script, or PowerShell ConvertTo-Json
DO NOT create temporary .py, .rb, .pl, .bat files — use inline commands via run_in_terminal

sequence.name: Stage 1: Platform Detection
sequence.desc: Scan source code and identify all technology platforms

block.field: MUST read techs-manifest.json to identify platforms and tech stacks
MUST read platform-mapping.json for standardized platform mapping rules
speccrew-read-config
${workspace_path}/docs/configs/platform-mapping.json
speccrew-knowledge-techs-init
Stage 1 task plan prepared. Waiting for calling Agent to dispatch. Task: speccrew-knowledge-techs-init Output: ${sync_state_techs_dir}/techs-manifest.json
${sync_state_techs_dir}/techs-manifest.json

block.desc: Validate at least one platform detected
block.field: No platforms detected in techs-manifest.json. Please check source_path and platform-mapping.json.
Stage 1 complete. Detected ${techs_manifest.platforms.length} platforms: ${techs_manifest.platforms.map(p => p.platform_id).join(', ')}

sequence.name: Stage 2: Tech Doc Generation
sequence.desc: Generate technology documentation for each platform in parallel

block.field: MUST prepare task plans for ALL platforms FIRST, then dispatch ALL workers SIMULTANEOUSLY
DO NOT finish one platform before starting the next — this wastes time and violates the pipeline design
The calling Agent MUST use concurrent task dispatch (e.g., dispatch 3 workers in one turn for 3 platforms)
Sequential platform-by-platform execution is FORBIDDEN
Loops S2-L1, S2-L2, S2-L3, and S2-L4 have parallel="true" and MUST execute concurrently for ALL platforms
ALL platform status updates (S2-L1) MUST be done SIMULTANEOUSLY in PARALLEL
ALL conventions worker task preparations (S2-L2) MUST be done SIMULTANEOUSLY in PARALLEL
ALL UI-style worker task preparations (S2-L3) MUST be done SIMULTANEOUSLY in PARALLEL
DO NOT process platforms sequentially — PARALLEL execution is MANDATORY
DO NOT wait for one platform to complete before starting another
DO NOT proceed to Stage 2.5 until ALL workers have completed or failed
Sequential execution of S2-L1, S2-L2, S2-L3, or S2-L4 is STRICTLY FORBIDDEN
node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('${completed_dir}', {recursive: true}); console.log('completed dir ready')"

block.desc: Update each platform status to processing

block.field: Preparing conventions worker task plans for ${techs_manifest.platforms.length} platforms...

block.desc: Prepare conventions worker task for each platform

block.field: speccrew-knowledge-techs-generate-conventions
Preparing UI-style worker task plans for frontend platforms...

block.desc: Prepare UI-style worker task for frontend platforms

block.field: Skipping UI-style for backend platform: ${platform.platform_id}
speccrew-knowledge-techs-generate-ui-style
Dispatching ALL workers in PARALLEL. The calling Agent should dispatch all prepared tasks simultaneously.
ALL platform monitoring tasks MUST be dispatched SIMULTANEOUSLY in a SINGLE orchestration turn
DO NOT process platforms one-by-one. Sequential execution is FORBIDDEN
ALL completion marker checks for ALL platforms MUST run in PARALLEL

block.desc: Monitor completion markers for each platform

block.field: Test-Path "${completed_dir}/${platform.platform_id}.done-conventions.json"
Test-Path "${completed_dir}/${platform.platform_id}.done-ui-style.json"
${completed_dir}/${platform.platform_id}.done-conventions.json
${completed_dir}/${platform.platform_id}.done-ui-style.json
speccrew-knowledge-techs-generate-quality
speccrew-knowledge-techs-generate-quality
Stage 2 complete. All platform workers finished.

sequence.name: Stage 2.5: Completion Verification
sequence.desc: Verify cross-platform consistency and document completeness before indexing

block.field: MUST scan ALL completion markers before proceeding
MUST verify document existence and completeness
MUST update stage2-status.json with verification results
ALL platform scans MUST be executed SIMULTANEOUSLY in PARALLEL — sequential scanning is FORBIDDEN
ALL platform integrity checks MUST be executed SIMULTANEOUSLY in PARALLEL — sequential verification is FORBIDDEN
Stage 2.5 loops S2_5-L1 and S2_5-L2 have parallel="true" and MUST execute concurrently
Stage 2.5 Step A: Scanning completion markers...
Stage 2.5 Step B: Verifying output integrity...
Stage 2.5 Step C: Updating progress status...
Stage 2.5 complete. Verification results written to stage2-status.json.

sequence.name: Stage 3: Root Index Generation
sequence.desc: Generate root INDEX.md aggregating all platform documentation

block.field: MUST read techs-manifest.json to get platform list
MUST scan each platform directory to detect which documents actually exist
MUST only include links to documents that actually exist
${sync_state_techs_dir}/techs-manifest.json
Stage 3: Preparing task plan for speccrew-knowledge-techs-index - Manifest: ${sync_state_techs_dir}/techs-manifest.json - Output: ${workspace_path}/knowledges/techs/ - Language: ${language}
speccrew-knowledge-techs-index
Stage 3 task plan prepared. Waiting for calling Agent to dispatch. Task: speccrew-knowledge-techs-index Output: ${workspace_path}/knowledges/techs/INDEX.md
Stage 3 complete. Root INDEX.md generated.
